      • Powered By

        • SPACEPORT

          A 'spaceport' is a site capable of launching spacecraft into interplanetary trajectories, the same way a seaport is for launching boats, and an airport is for launching aircraft.

          This 'spaceport' is for launching YOU!

          Think of it as a 'Youport'... a platform for launching you into your next steps along your (r)evolutionary Path.

          We hope you do what matters most, and have as much Fun as you can!

          As consciousness-explorer Joseph Chilton Pearce says, “Perhaps the scope of this work sounds a bit broad for a single volume, and I can hear complaints that I attempt too much. But I argue that all too often we attempt too little. Better an impossible task of splendid proportion than a sure but piddling one of no consequence. We learn from failures as well as successes.”

          As Lee Lozowick would say, “If it is not impossible, why bother doing it?”

          NOTE: This is a directory of interlinked websites in the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. Each website is a doorway to context and experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin to 'next culture' - Archiarchy - and can create more clarity and possibility for delivering the nonmaterial value of your Archetypal Lineage . Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a Low Drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read these websites. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SPACEPOR.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

        • Get the latest StartOver News Here

        • #'s

          StartOver.xyz websites that begin with numbers.

          1 True Thing

          1truething.mystrikingly.com

           

           

           

          2 Dramas

          2dramas.mystrikingly.com

          There is a difference between drama and life. Imagine not knowing the difference. It could be a lot of energy spent trying to avoid responsibility, which, in a responsible universe like this one, may be energy used in a fool's agenda.

          (one of the PM Processes)

          2 Rapid Learnings

          2rapidlearnings.mystrikingly.com

          1. Pressure Learning:

          gobeepshiftgo.mystrikingly.com

          2. Vacuum Learning:

          vacuumlearning.mystrikingly.com

          3-3-3 Initiation

          3-3-3.mystrikingly.com

          rageclub.org

          alifeofpractice.mystrikingly.com

          3cells.mystrikingly.com

          ehpdojo.mystrikingly.com

          process.mystrikingly.com

          3domainsoflove.mystrikingly.com

          3 Games

          3games.mystrikingly.com

          Games have a context and a purpose. If you try to play a game in a different context, the rules of engagement change. If you invite a tennis player to a football game you end up with a net across the field. Knowing which game you are invited to and which game you want to play can make all the difference in the world.

          (one of the PM Thoughtmaps)

          3 Phase Healing

          3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com

          3 PHASE Healing removes you from the illness rather than trying to remove the illness from you.

          Also see:

          darkmattertherapy.mystrikingly.com

          integrityhealing.mystrikingly.com

          worthinghealers.mystrikingly.com

          pastlifevow.mystrikingly.com

          disjointment.mystrikingly.com

          demonslayer.mystrikingly.com

          feelingspractitioner.com

          archanshamanism.mystrikingly.com

          pmhealingvillage.mystrikingly.com

          3 Powers

          3powers.mystrikingly.com

          School could have been about unfolding your potential so you could deliver your services to the Village. But school is NOT about that. Your 3 Powers go unnoticed and untrained in school, absentmindedly suppressed. Nonetheless: "What you came here to find is what you came here to build." You need these 3 Powers to change the world... which means turning on and skilling up!

          1. declaring.mystrikingly.com
          2. choosing.mystrikingly.com
          3. asking.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Processes)

          3 Worlds

          3worlds.mystrikingly.com

          You were taught an unquestionable Thoughtmap of Worlds along with a religion that includes constructs like good and bad, heaven and hell, us and them. What if you are using very outdated thoughtware, long past its 'best if used by:___' date? What sort of thoughtware upgrade could serve you as an edgeworker, building bridges to next culture?

          Also see:

          mapofpossibility.mystrikingly.com

          brightprinciples.mystrikingly.com

          shadowprinciples.mystrikingly.com

          gremlin.mystrikingly.com

          navigatespace.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Thoughtmaps)

          3zones.mystrikingly.com

          122 Methoden, um gewöhnliche Beziehungen zu erstellen

          122methoden.mystrikingly.com

          Es gibt gewöhnliche Bereiche der Liebe, außergewöhnliche Bereiche der Liebe und archetypische Bereiche der Liebe. Sie wurden entwickelt, um durch alle 3 Domänen der Liebe zu navigieren.

          Dies ist ein Auszug aus Clinton Callahans Buch Wahre Liebe im Alltage, herausgegeben von Next Culture Press.

          122 Ways To Create Ordinary Love

          122ways.mystrikingly.com

          There are ordinary domains of love, extraordinary domains of love, and archetypal domains of Love. You are designed to navigate all 3 Domains Of Love.

          This is an excerpt from Clinton Callahan's book Building Love That Lasts published by Hohm Press.

          Archan Law

          archanlaw.mystrikingly.com

          The Rule Of Law of modern culture is exterminating life on Earth at the fastest possible rate. Anyone following the Rule Of Law of modern culture is criminally insane. Anyone enforcing the Rule Of Law of modern culture has already forfeited their life.

          Archiarchy implements an entirely different Rule Of Law, the Law of Radical Responsibility centered on Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processess. Anything not Regenerative is illegal in Archiarchy, which adopts a Bill Of Wrongs rather than a Bill Of Rights. Archiarchy implements Universal Jurisdiction and Citizen Arrests, Emotional Healing Processes, Torus Meeting Technology, etc.

          Archan Law is a Specialty in Possibilitator Training.

          It is time.

          There is a new future.

          This is the way.

          Also see:

          gameworldtheory.mystrikingly.com

          regenerateearthgoals.mystrikingly.com

          bountyhunters.mystrikingly.com

          reorder.mystrikingly.com

          gameworlddemolition.mystrikingly.com

          Archiarchy

          archiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          Archiarchy is the regenerative local-authority initiation-centered culture that is naturally emerging around the world now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

          Also see:

          patriarchy.mystrikingly.com

          gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com

          culturetoculture.mystrikingly.com

          experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          gaiavillage.mystrikingly.com

          Experience Archiarchy - a travelguide

          experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          There are guide books for countries and cities, but none yet for Archiarchy. This is the first. There will also be an Archiarchy Phrase Book to help you learn the language!
          Some Archans who are currently nomadic, will be visiting Archan-type projects and researching possible entries for the guide book. Let us know if you are one!

          Archiarchy Artabana

          archiarchyartabana.mystrikingly.com

          A global network of next culture health cooperatives.

          Also see:

          archiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com

          selfsurgery.mystrikingly.com

          Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs)

          archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com

          A global network of youth building and inhabiting Archan gameworlds as prototypes for the United Nations Pact For The Future. The Path emerges by walking it.

          Also see:

          Archiarchy Makers Fair

          archiarchymakersfair.mystrikingly.com

          It is time!
          Phase 1 of Archiarchy is complet e. Archiarchy already exists in the world.

          Now it is time for Phase 2 of Archiarchy: building and inhabiting Archiarchal Gameworlds. We are building Archan nonmaterial infrastructure.

          Are you an Archiarchy Maker? See you at the fair!

          StartOver.xyz websites that begin with 'B'.

          Bag Of Things

          bagofthings.mystrikingly.com

          (one of your 13 Tools)

          Baggage

          baggage.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Processes)

          You may be burdened by carrying around extra Baggage with you, such as:

          • Abandoning your Integrity
          • Addicted
          • Adult Egostate Contaminated by Child, Parent, Gremlin or Demon
          • Assumptions
          • Being Adaptive
          • Being Unbubbled
          • Being Uncentered
          • Being Ungrounded
          • Being Uninitiated
          • Beliefs
          • Boundaries weak or lacking
          • Brain Drugs
          • Brain Splits
          • Broken Bullshit Detector
          • Child Level Responsibility
          • Complexity
          • Conclusions
          • Confusion
          • Contaminated Adult Egostate
          • Cross-Wired Memes
          • Disjointment
          • Disrespecting Your Own Word
          • Dramaholic
          • Energetic Blocks
          • Expanded NOW into the past and the future
          • Expectations
          • Fantasy Worlds
          • Fear Of Connection
          • Gremlin addictions
          • Gremlin Self Cannibalism
          • Gremlin Violence
          • Guilt
          • Handsome Holy Tribal Man (or Woman)
          • Having a Job
          • Having No Boundaries
          • Having No Sword Of Clarity
          • Having No Voice
          • Hidden Competing Commitments
          • Hookability
          • I Am Wrong
          • Ignorance of Consequences
          • Illusions or Delusions
          • Insanity
          • Judgments
          • Justifications
          • Knowing - thinking you must know
          • Lack of Integrity
          • Listening To Voices In Your Head
          • Low Dramas
          • Lying
          • Manipulation
          • Material Values
          • Materialism
          • Memetic Prisons
          • Mind Machines
          • Misidentifications
          • Mixed Emotions
          • Not being committed
          • Not being Healed From School
          • Not decided to be born yet
          • Not going through the Eye Of The Needle
          • Not having Holdings
          • Not Noticing What you are Noticing With
          • Not using your 3 Powers
          • Patriarchal Values
          • Point Of Origin anchored into Ordinary
          • Poop swept under the carpet
          • Positionality
          • Prejudices
          • Projections
          • Radical Dishonesty
          • Reactivity
          • Really Difficult Problems
          • Really Good Reasons
          • Resentment
          • Revenge in your mind and heart
          • Self Abuse
          • Self Deception
          • Shame
          • Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.)
          • Starving for Heart Food or Soul Food
          • Stories
          • Survival Strategy
          • Taking No Stand
          • Thinking you are your Box
          • Unable to Say What You Want
          • Unconscious Decisions from childhood and past lives
          • Unstellated Feelings
          • Untransformed Gremlin

          If you are carrying around ANY of this extra Baggage, your Adulthood Initiatory Path will definitely include facing the choice of not carrying so much Baggage around with you anymore.

          What about carrying around no baggage?

          Wouldn't that be remarkable?

          Radical Simplicity is amazing.

          Become An Elder

          becomeanelder.mystrikingly.com

          Adults are made by other Adults through Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes. But Elders are not made by other Elders.

          Elders are made by Adolescents who trust them enough to come to them and ask for help to get prepared for their Adulthood Initiations.

          Inla Kesh Bridgehouse

          inlakeshchiapas.org

          Magic Cow Bridgehouse 

          (New York)

          magiccowbridgehouse.wordpress.com

          We know it is out there: it is possible for people to live together in a more loving, connected, and empowered way. A way where our Beings align with archetypal forces and create spaces for things like Love or Transformation. But how do we get there? How do we transform the parts of ourselves that block this kind of living and create separateness or smallness? The way we’ve found is to live in Radical Responsibility. Magic Cow Bridgehouse is in New York.

          Building Love That Lasts 1-100

          buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

          Based on the Hohm Press book: Building Love That Lasts by Clinton Callahan.

          Includes the first 100 Next Culture Radio Podcasts from the Radiant Joy Brilliant Love / Building Love That Lasts year-long Study Group with the author!

          The weekly online Building Love That Lasts Study Group is reopening.

          To join, please contact Eva Daubert at: mailforeva at web dot de

          Building Love That Lasts 101- ?

          buildinglovethatlasts101.mystrikingly.com

          Based on the Thoughtware Press books: Building Love That Lasts (rereleased as Creating Extaordinary Love) and then Cavitation: the emergence of Archiarchy by Clinton Callahan.

          Includes Next Culture Radio Podcasts from the Radiant Joy Brilliant Love / Building Love That Lasts year-long Study Group with the author starting at meeting 101!

          The weekly online Building Love That Lasts Study Group is reopening and reads from Cavitation.

          Story World

          Deconstellate Yourself

          deconstellateyourself.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Adulthood Initiation Processes)

          Many people adopted the Survival Strategy of mapping on to the Survival Strategy of one of their parents or grandparents. This role model fills up their interior with 'not themselves'. We have discovered that it is possible in a Possibility Coaching EHP to Deconstellate you from your Family Constellation by giving an artifact of the role model back to the person you copied it from.

          Deconstructions

          deconstructions.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Adulthood Initiation Processes)

          Many people adopt the Survival Strategy of building a Memetic Construct inside of themselves as a belief system or world view, a story that they regard as immutable. This Inner Structure then serves as an abode for random 'Riders', energetic vampire entities that feed on your energy and can prevent physical and psycho-emotional imbalances from healing. We have discovered that through a Possibility Coaching Deconstruction Process you can Deconstruct your Memetic Construct, thus removing the home of the parasites who are then easy to flush out, thus allowing the needed healing to occur.

          Decontamination

          decontamination.mystrikingly.com

          Our Research Teams have discovered the long hard slow way that many more people than we ever imagined adopted the Survival Strategy of Contaminating their Adult Egostate with their Child, Parent, Gremlin, or Demon Egostate. This blocks them from Connection, Healing, and Authentic Adulthood Initiations. Decontaminating the Child Egostate, Parent Egostate, Gremlin Egostate, and Demon Egostate out of the Adult Egostate depends on first succeeding with Gremlin Transformation and recovering from Dramaholism. Successfully accomplishing Gremlin Transformation is a prerequisite for beginning Decontaminations.

          (a 3 Phase Healing process, and one of the PM Processes)

          Also see:

          gremlintransformation.mystrikingly.com

          dramaholic.mystrikingly.com

          Experience Archiarchy

          experiencearchiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          There are guide books to countries and cities, but none yet to Archiarchy. This is the first. There will also be an Archiarchy Phrase Book to help you learn the language!
          Some Archans who are currently nomadic will be visiting Archiarchan-type projects and researching possible entries for the guide book. Let us know if you are one!

          Guardianship

          guardianship.mystrinkigly.com

          Being a Guardian is one of the 4 Archetypal Lineage categories needed for a gameworld to thrive. Guardianship is taking Radically Responsible care of something for the simple reason that you want it to exist, not for any reward, privilege, appreciation, or an exchange of money.

          Also see:

          4lineages.mystrikingly.com

          PM Adventskalender 2009 and 2010

          pmadventskalender.mystrikingly.com

          A mostly German website...

          In both 2009 and 2010, a Team of courageous and wildly creative Possibilitators created 24 magical doorways to be seen once a day from 1. - 24. December as an Advent Calendar. These films are mostly spoken in German, but include some amazing clips in English...

          PM Solstice Calendar 2022

          pmsolsticecalendar.mystrikingly.com

          Have you heard of an 'Advent Calendar' counting down from December 1 to 'Christmas Eve'? What an exciting thing, eh? A little free surprise gift to brighten each day! Our Bridgehouse just invented a Gaian evolution of this tradition, counting down from December 1 to the Solstice - December 21, the longest AND shortest day of the year, depending on which hemisphere you are in! Welcome to the first-ever Archiarchal Advent'ure Solstice Calendar!

          Possibilica - a nomadic nanonation

          possibilica.mystrikingly.com

          Possibilica is a nomadic Archiarchal Gaian Gameworld Nanonation delivering transformational trainings, evolutionary processes, and authentic adulthood and archetypal initiations to ecovillages, groups, and individuals through the tools, thoughtmaps, and processes of Possibility Management. We have our own flag, our own Constitution, and are writing our own Codex to set the context and rules of engagement of our Torus Technology gameworld.

          archiarchy.mystrikingly.com

          possibilitymanagement.org/doingit/plabs

          Possibility Management - Home

          possibilitymanagement.org

          This is the home base for the Possibility Management gameworld. It tells you what Possibility Management is, how to learn it in trainings such as Expand The Box and Possibility Labs, how to practice it in Possibility Teams and Possibility Coaching, and how to learn to serve as a Possibility Management Trainer. It also provides a calendar of events and a list of Possibility Management trainers.

          Possibility Management - Info

          possibilitymanagement.mystrikingly.com

          What is Possibility Management itself?

          How is it possible to manage Possibility?

          (one of the PM Processes)

        • Q-R

          StartOver.xyz websites that begin with 'Q' or 'R'.

          Quit School

          http://quitschool.mystrikingly.com

          Yes, you can Quit School.

          Even if you are 50 years old, you can get out of the conforming, adaptive, self-disempowering survival habits that you adopted while you were a student in school.

          Do you think it is about time?

          Also see:

          healfromschool.mystrikingly.com

          Radical Action

          radicalaction.mystrikingly.com

          Radical Freedom

          radicalfreedom.mystrikingly.com

          If you manipulate yourself to do what you already want to do, then you are afraid of someone else enough to give them power over your life. In other words, you are not free to begin your Adulthood journey. Is it time to leave adolescence behind but not time to start your initiations? Then it is time for a year or two of Radical Freedom. What are you waiting for?

          Also see:

          adulthood.mystrikingly.com

          manipulation.mystrikingly.com

          8prisons.mystrikingly.com

          growupnow.mystrikingly.com

          initiations.mystrikingly.com

          bridgehouse.mystrikingly.com

          Radical Freedom Bridgehouse

          radicalfreedombridge-house.mystrikingly.com

          If you do not stand in Radical Freedom as your Point Of Origin, how do you think you are going to step into your Authentic Adulthood Initiations Processes as anything other than a poor, self-manipulating, pressure Victim?

          radicalfreedom.mystrikingly.com

          ranchocampo.mystrikingly.com

          Regenerate Earth Goals (REGs)

          regenerateearthgoals.mystrikingly.com

          The popularized United Nations' SDGs (Sustainable Development Goals) are no longer valid. Nothing about modern culture can be 'sustained' without further exterminating life on Earth. Possibility Management formally proposes (December 2023) to replace SDGs with REGs (Regenerate Earth Goals), as part of the September 2024 United Nations Summit Of The Future to create a new Pact For The Future.

          Also see:

          whatnow.mystrikingly.com

          robert wolff

          author of the inspiring and highly recommended book: Original Wisdom
          MATRIX CODE: BOOK0142.00

          wildwolff.mystrikingly.com

          When researcher and author robert wolff died in 2015 there was no one who took over maintaining his generous website where he offered all his writings and musings, always downloadable for free. The realization that all robert's gifts might suddenly vanish from the world was a shock to me, so I stepped up and built up a replacement website using the same URL he chose: wildwolff. If you have saved something of his that you think should go there, please send it to me and I will upload it. Thank you! Meanwhile, happy reading!

          - Clinton Callahan

          Also see:

          possibilitybooks.mystrikingly.com

          SpacePort

          spaceport.mystrikingly.com

          You are NOW at the Spaceport.

          This is the catalog of what you might want to explore in the StartOver.xyz gameworld.

          Think of this as a 'YouPort', a portal for transporting you to your next step along your Path.

          Also see:

          howtoplay.mystrikingly.com

          SPARK Experiments (English)

          "Every revolution begins with a spark..."

          sparks-english.mystrikingly.com

          S.P.A.R.K. stands for 'Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge'. Reading a S.P.A.R.K. earns you 1 Matrix Point in the StartOver.xyz game. Doing any of the S.P.A.R.K. Experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Doing S.P.A.R.K. Experiments upgrades your thoughtware because S.P.A.R.K.s are written memetically. Upgrading your thoughtware changes the morphogenetic field of the human race, which may be the most powerful force (outside of global warming...) for changing the status quo. S.P.A.R.K.s are thoughtware for Archiarchy.

          S.P.A.R.K.s are available in a growing number of languages.

          You can help.

          Also see:

          sparkpodcasts-en.mytrikingly.com

          possibilitatorresources.mystrikingly.com

          starrs.mystrikingly.com

          yourteams.mystrikingly.com

          Your Teams are, for example, your Study Group, S.P.A.R.K. Experiment Circle, Research Team, Possibility Team, Whole Permaculture Team, Rage Club, Fear Club, 3 Cell, Safe Circle, Riftwalker Team, Edgeworker Team, Growness Team, Trainer Path Team, Whole Permaculture Team, New Refugees Circle, Village Seeds Circle, Earth Guardians Circle, Village Weavers Circle, Evolutionaries Circle, Gameworld Builders Circle, Possibility Coaching Circle, Possibility Mediators Circle, Possibility Psychologists Circle, Memetic Engineers Circle, Mage Training Circle, Practice Team, etc.

          Your Treasure

          yourtreasure.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Processes)

          Also see:

          nonmaterialvalue.mystrikingly.com

          brightprinciples.mystrikingly.com

          knacks.mystrikingly.com

          archetypallineage.mystrikingly.com

          radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com

          Your Word

          yourword.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Processes)

          Also see:

          Zombies

          zombies.mystrikingly.com

          You support the Values of any Gameworld in which you participate.

          We define a 'Zombie' as 'anyone who is not aware of the Values of the Gameworlds in which they participate'.

          SPARK232 says: Thinking there is a plan for what to do next makes you a Zombie.

          Also see:

          whatnow.mystrikingly.com

          values.mystrikingly.com

          guardianship.mystrikingly.com

          youandyourjob.mystrikingly.com

          thehierarchy.mystrikingly.com

          patriarchy.mystrikingly.com

          psychopath.mystrikingly.com

          swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com

          setcontext.mystrikingly.com

          culturetoculture.mystrikingly.com

          healfromschool.mystrikingly.com

          authority.mystrikingly.com Zombieism is cured through a person taking back radical personal Authority.

          "Every person we save is one less Zombie we have to fight." (...from the film World War Z.)

        • DIRECTORY OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT (PM) WEBSITES

          StartOver.xyz

          NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-playmassively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change themorphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SPACEPOR.00 to log your MatrixPoint for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

        Create a site with
        This website is built with Strikingly.

        This website is built with Strikingly.

        Create your FREE website today!

          Cookie Use
          We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More
          Accept all
          Settings
          Decline All
          ×
          What Are Cookies?

          Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

          Our Cookies

          When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

          In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

          Third-Party cookies

          In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

          How To Disable Cookies?

          Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

          Cookie Use
          We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
